title: Charlie Fish Tracker
tagline: A simple fishing catch tracking application

userStory.iWant: to track my fishing catches including species, length, weight, and location
userStory.soThat: I can review my fishing history and improve my skills over time

notes.title: Project Overview
notes.text: A web application for tracking fishing catches with features for adding, viewing, searching, filtering, and managing catch data. Includes authentication, data persistence via GitHub Gist, and an admin dashboard.
notes.author: PatrickG241

notes.title: Tech Stack
notes.text: Built with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (vanilla), Bootstrap 5, Bootstrap Icons, Google Fonts (Roboto), jQuery, and jQuery UI. Uses localStorage and sessionStorage for data persistence, and GitHub Gist API for cloud backup.
notes.author: PatrickG241
